description: Fixed cross-season contamination in Cat 52 season percentile accumulators. _season_spreads and _season_totals were initialized once and grew across ALL seasons, making line52_spread_season_pct and line52_total_season_pct compute lifetime percentiles instead of within-season percentiles. Fixed by adding a season-boundary reset: each time _era_season_id(gd) changes, both lists are cleared. Now line52_spread_season_pct correctly reflects 'where does this spread rank among THIS season\'s spreads so far' rather than a diluted multi-season historical rank. The _team_ats and _team_ou trackers are intentionally NOT reset (cross-season ATS/OU tendencies are useful signal).
root_cause: Variables named _season_spreads and _season_totals were described as 'this season' in comments but never reset at season boundaries. After 2+ seasons, the percentile rank of any spread or total was computed against a large multi-season pool, degrading the within-season signal in line52_spread_season_pct, line52_total_season_pct, line52_season_spread_std, and the Cat54 _tot_trend54 feature (which references _season_totals). No crash, no warning — silent semantic mismatch.

test_suite.note: Change is additive (season reset at boundary). No feature count or name changes. All fallback paths unchanged. No regressions expected.

audit_findings.detail: 4 bare except: blocks in odds parsing (lines 271, 276, 284, 288) — FIXED iter 9
9 bare except: blocks in datetime helpers — FIXED iter 11
1 bare except: in CV model fitting (line 7060) — FIXED iter 12
ats53_a_away_only was silently computing all-game ATS rate due to `if home_only:` treating False as falsy — FIXED iter 13
_season_spreads/_season_totals accumulated cross-season, making Cat52 percentile/std features lifetime metrics instead of within-season — FIXED this iteration

next_iteration.method: Cat 52 fallback row sets line52_spread_agree=1.0 (assumes spread and ML agree by default — biased toward home-favorite assumption). True neutral default should be 0.5. Also audit whether _season_totals reset in Cat54 _tot_trend54 now correctly references the reset list (it does — same variable). Small cleanup: line52_sharpness default 0.952 = 1/1.05 is consistent with overround=1.05, confirm it matches typical no-odds behavior.
